results.rendered_html:
kātyāyanī
1 An elderly or middleaged widow (dressed in red clothes).
2 N. of a wife of Yājnavalkya.
3 N. of Pārvatī.
Comp.
— putraḥ, -sutaḥ N. of Kārtikeya.
